version_description: Renamed can_schedule_same_day to can_review_same_day across global_prompt and components. Fixed get_time_context tool URL from premier-md/time-context to newtown-gi/time-context. Replaced response_variables with full 10-key multi-location mapping. Added {{}} to plain variable refs in condition labels.
version_title: Rename can_schedule_same_day to can_review_same_day; fix tool URL
